response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong general software engineering skills and diverse technical experience, they lack several critical requirements: native Japanese proficiency (explicitly required), deep C expertise for embedded systems, security technology background (encryption, authentication, attack detection, tamper detection), and networking/switch domain knowledge. Their background is primarily full-stack web and backend development with minimal embedded firmware or security specialization.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse software development experience across multiple domains and platforms
Solid systems-level thinking demonstrated through DevOps infrastructure work, D language expertise, and some embedded hardware experience
Strong technical communication and mentoring skills shown through workshops, open-source contributions, and teaching experience
concerns: No native Japanese language proficiency, which is an explicit hard requirement for the role
Limited C programming expertise—only brief National Instruments experience; no demonstrated embedded systems or firmware C specialization

No background in required security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption protocols, attack/tamper detection) or networking domains (Layer-2/3 switches, NETCONF, SNMP, Telemetry, switch chip knowledge)
